title: ArcCloseFilingReviewSubstrateListenerWiringCompleted payload
description: Emitted by chain arc-close-filing-review-substrate-listener-wiring T10 as the closing audit event. Mirrors the parent chain's ArcCloseFilingReviewSubstrateAuditCompleted (one-shot retrospective program writes the row through events.Emit). Records the chain's structural deliveries (substrate-listener wiring + 5/5 trigger events + read-side audit action), the two ML follow-on chains forged, the T9 corpus snapshot path, and the wiring SHA. Substrate self-host: the chain that built the listener emits its closing event through the listener's substrate.

audit_doc.description: Path to the chain retrospective doc (typically docs/ARC_CLOSE_FILING_REVIEW_SUBSTRATE_LISTENER_RETROSPECTIVE_<YYYY-MM-DD>.md).

summary.description: One-paragraph narrative summary of what the chain shipped and what remains as follow-on work.

tasks_completed.description: Task slugs closed during the chain. Optional; the retrospective doc carries the same list with commit SHAs.

follow_on_chain_slugs.description: Slugs of chains forged during T10 (typically the two trained-* ML follow-ons).

corpus_snapshot_path.description: Path to the T9 tuning corpus doc, the load-bearing artifact the ML follow-ons consume.

observer_wiring_sha.description: Commit SHA that landed the SubstrateReviewObserver registration in main.go. The wiring's load-bearing line; future readers tracing 'when did substrate-side observation become real?' look here first.

recommended_next_phase.description: Optional pointer to the next chain in the substrate-listener evolution: corpus accumulation gates, ML promotion gates, or operator-side rollout.

findings.description: Per-acceptance-criterion findings list, mirroring the ArchitectureAuditCompleted shape. Optional; the retrospective doc carries the canonical version.
